XBR::SetDefaultState (XbView)

XBR::SetDefaultState sets the render states to the defaults required for XbView.

HRESULT XBR::SetDefaultState()
{
    static DWORD dwALPHATESTENABLE = FALSE;
    static DWORD dwALPHAREF = 0x08;
    static DWORD dwTextureFactor = 0xFFFFFFFF;
    static BOOL dwLighting = FALSE;
    static D3DZBUFFERTYPE zb = D3DZB_TRUE;
    static D3DCULL cull = D3DCULL_CCW;
	
    g_pd3dDevice->SetRenderState( D3DRS_ALPHATESTENABLE, dwALPHATESTENABLE );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetRenderState( D3DRS_ALPHAREF, dwALPHAREF );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetRenderState( D3DRS_ALPHABLENDENABLE, FALSE );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetRenderState( D3DRS_TEXTUREFACTOR, dwTextureFactor );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetRenderState( D3DRS_LIGHTING, dwLighting );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetRenderState( D3DRS_ZENABLE, zb );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetRenderState( D3DRS_CULLMODE, cull );
    m_pd3dDevice->SetRenderState( D3DRS_ZWRITEENABLE, TRUE );
    
    static D3DTEXTURECOLORKEYOP colorkeyop = D3DTCOLORKEYOP_DISABLE;
    static D3DCOLOR colorkeycolor = 0xff000000;
    static D3DTEXTUREFILTERTYPE dwMagFilter = D3DTEXF_LINEAR;
    static D3DTEXTUREFILTERTYPE dwMinFilter = D3DTEXF_POINT;
    static DWORD dwMaxAnisotropy = 4;
    static D3DTEXTUREALPHAKILL dwALPHAKILL = D3DTALPHAKILL_DISABLE;
    
    static D3DTEXTUREOP TSS0_ColorOp = D3DTOP_MODULATE;
    static DWORD TSS0_ColorArg1 = D3DTA_TEXTURE;
    static DWORD TSS0_ColorArg2 = D3DTA_DIFFUSE;
    static D3DTEXTUREOP TSS0_AlphaOp = D3DTOP_SELECTARG1;
    static DWORD TSS0_AlphaArg1 = D3DTA_TEXTURE;
    static DWORD TSS0_AlphaArg2 = D3DTA_DIFFUSE;
    static D3DTEXTUREADDRESS TSS0_ta = D3DTADDRESS_WRAP;
	
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_COLOROP, TSS0_ColorOp );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_COLORARG1, TSS0_ColorArg1 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_COLORARG2, TSS0_ColorArg2 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_ALPHAOP, TSS0_AlphaOp );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_ALPHAARG1, TSS0_AlphaArg1 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_ALPHAARG2, TSS0_AlphaArg2 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_ADDRESSU, TSS0_ta );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_ADDRESSV, TSS0_ta );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_MAGFILTER, dwMagFilter );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_MINFILTER, dwMinFilter );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_MAXANISOTROPY, dwMaxAnisotropy );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_ALPHAKILL, dwALPHAKILL );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_COLORKEYOP,    colorkeyop );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 0, D3DTSS_COLORKEYCOLOR, colorkeycolor );

    static D3DTEXTUREOP TSS1_ColorOp = D3DTOP_DISABLE;
    static DWORD TSS1_ColorArg1 = D3DTA_TEXTURE;
    static DWORD TSS1_ColorArg2 = D3DTA_DIFFUSE;
    static D3DTEXTUREOP TSS1_AlphaOp = D3DTOP_DISABLE;
    static DWORD TSS1_AlphaArg1 = D3DTA_TEXTURE;
    static DWORD TSS1_AlphaArg2 = D3DTA_DIFFUSE;
    static D3DTEXTUREADDRESS TSS1_ta = D3DTADDRESS_WRAP;
	
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_COLOROP, TSS1_ColorOp );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_COLORARG1, TSS1_ColorArg1 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_COLORARG2, TSS1_ColorArg2 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_ALPHAOP, TSS1_AlphaOp );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_ALPHAARG1, TSS1_AlphaArg1 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_ALPHAARG2, TSS1_AlphaArg2 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_ADDRESSU, TSS1_ta );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_ADDRESSV, TSS1_ta );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_MAGFILTER, dwMagFilter );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_MINFILTER, dwMinFilter );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_MAXANISOTROPY, dwMaxAnisotropy );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_ALPHAKILL, dwALPHAKILL );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_COLORKEYOP,    colorkeyop );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 1, D3DTSS_COLORKEYCOLOR, colorkeycolor );

    static D3DTEXTUREOP TSS2_ColorOp = D3DTOP_DISABLE;
    static DWORD TSS2_ColorArg1 = D3DTA_TEXTURE;
    static DWORD TSS2_ColorArg2 = D3DTA_DIFFUSE;
    static D3DTEXTUREOP TSS2_AlphaOp = D3DTOP_DISABLE;
    static DWORD TSS2_AlphaArg1 = D3DTA_TEXTURE;
    static DWORD TSS2_AlphaArg2 = D3DTA_DIFFUSE;
    static D3DTEXTUREADDRESS TSS2_ta = D3DTADDRESS_WRAP;
	
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_COLOROP, TSS2_ColorOp );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_COLORARG1, TSS2_ColorArg1 ); 
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_COLORARG2, TSS2_ColorArg2 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_ALPHAOP, TSS2_AlphaOp );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_ALPHAARG1, TSS2_AlphaArg1 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_ALPHAARG2, TSS2_AlphaArg2 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_ADDRESSU, TSS2_ta );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_ADDRESSV, TSS2_ta );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_MAGFILTER, dwMagFilter );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_MINFILTER, dwMinFilter );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_MAXANISOTROPY, dwMaxAnisotropy );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_ALPHAKILL, dwALPHAKILL );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_COLORKEYOP,    colorkeyop );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 2, D3DTSS_COLORKEYCOLOR, colorkeycolor );

    static D3DTEXTUREOP TSS3_ColorOp = D3DTOP_DISABLE;
    static DWORD TSS3_ColorArg1 = D3DTA_TEXTURE;
    static DWORD TSS3_ColorArg2 = D3DTA_DIFFUSE;
    static D3DTEXTUREOP TSS3_AlphaOp = D3DTOP_DISABLE;
    static DWORD TSS3_AlphaArg1 = D3DTA_TEXTURE;
    static DWORD TSS3_AlphaArg2 = D3DTA_DIFFUSE;
    static D3DTEXTUREADDRESS TSS3_ta = D3DTADDRESS_WRAP;
	
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_COLOROP, TSS3_ColorOp );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_COLORARG1, TSS3_ColorArg1 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_COLORARG2, TSS3_ColorArg2 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_ALPHAOP, TSS3_AlphaOp );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_ALPHAARG1, TSS3_AlphaArg1 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_ALPHAARG2, TSS3_AlphaArg2 );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_ADDRESSU, TSS3_ta );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_ADDRESSV, TSS3_ta );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_MAGFILTER, dwMagFilter );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_MINFILTER, dwMinFilter );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_MAXANISOTROPY, dwMaxAnisotropy );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_ALPHAKILL, dwALPHAKILL );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_COLORKEYOP,    colorkeyop );
    g_pd3dDevice->SetTextureStageState( 3, D3DTSS_COLORKEYCOLOR, colorkeycolor );

    return S_OK;
}
Unpublished work. © 2000 Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.
